channel.title: steefware blog
channel.description: The ideas and math behind steefware's simple, free web tools.

item.title: Aflossingstabel berekenen: zo werkt je maandbedrag
item.description: Hoe een annuïteit werkt, waarom je eerst vooral interest betaalt, en hoe je zelf je aflossingstabel opstelt. (Nederlands)

item.title: VVPR-bis uitgelegd: dividend aan 15% roerende voorheffing
item.description: De voorwaarden, de wachttermijnen en een rekenvoorbeeld voor de verlaagde roerende voorheffing op dividenden. (Nederlands)

item.title: See your live energy use on an LED strip: WLED + HomeWizard P1
item.description: Flash WLED with the HomeWizard P1 usermod straight from your browser and turn your smart meter data into an ambient energy light.

item.title: How full is my tank, really?
item.description: Why 50 cm on the dipstick is not 50% of the volume — the circular segment math behind tank levels.

item.title: How many solar panels fit on your roof?
item.description: Panel dimensions, edge setbacks, portrait vs landscape — the geometry your installer's quote glosses over.

item.title: How solar production forecasts work
item.description: From cloud cover to kilowatt-hours: what goes into predicting what your panels will produce tomorrow.

item.title: What actually makes a password strong
item.description: Length beats cleverness. A short tour of password entropy, and why four random words beat "Tr0ub4dor&3".

item.title: The right triangle: hypotenuse, angles and area explained
item.description: Pythagoras, arctangent and area: the math behind roofs, ramps and ladders, with worked examples.

item.title: Learn how the market works by losing fake money
item.description: StockSim is not financial advice. It is financial anti-advice, and that is the point.

item.title: Sorry for this one: a Birdy Flap postmortem
item.description: What building a Flappy Bird clone teaches you about gravity, game feel, and shame.
